subject: Fix #17-H — RT/CT resource-fields enrichment
description: DONE. Fix #17-H verified on PLAN-20260423135649: resource_name, category_priority, team_id, team_name, group_id, group_name all at 100% for both RT (244) and CT (98). resource_category stays null on RT/CT as expected (no underlying demand). BSA_id/request_id stay null as expected.
